steps.expression:
(let* ((lines (filter-list (lambda (s) (boolean-not (string=? s ""))) (string->list (dict-get inputs "content") "
"))) (lower-lines (filter-list (lambda (s) (string=? s (string-downcase s))) lines)) (upper-lines (filter-list (lambda (s) (string=? s (string-upcase s))) lines)) (lower-out (string-concat (list->string lower-lines "
") "
")) (upper-out (string-concat (list->string upper-lines "
") "
"))) (dict (list "lowercase" lower-out) (list "uppercase" upper-out)))
